SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $900.00 AGAINST DEFENDANT ALLEN BROCK PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 2023.010(D). JUDGE: ANDREW CHENG, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of The Matters Asserted And Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions Against Allen Brock
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff RJM Acquisitions LLC's Motion for an order compelling responses to special interrogatories and requests for production of documents is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed.
Plaintiff's motion for an order establishing admissions is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed.
Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $900.00 against defendant Allen Brock pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 2023.010(d). Judge: Andrew Cheng, not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Set For Trial On Jan-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
